subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that in these tribulations Bahá seeketh not comfort, but placeth his hope entirely in Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تعلم بان البهاء فی هذه الشداید مایرید الرخاء بل رجائه فیکل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
